feed.title: Nicholas O'Sullivan
feed.subtitle: The Portfolio of Nicholas O'Sullivan, ICT Counsultant, TOwnsville.

entry.title: Second Post
entry.summary: Recently, I’ve been venturing into the realm of Ruby with Jekyll - A static site generator. So far, it’s taken me a month to go live with this template - But, I think I’m ready for production - So, welcome to the new site!

entry.title: Welcome to the new Site
entry.summary: Recently, I’ve been venturing into the realm of Ruby with Jekyll - A static site generator. So far, it’s taken me a month to go live with this template - But, I think I’m ready for production - So, welcome to the new site!
